Bash(node -e "['2026-05-18','2026-05-11','2026-05-04','2026-04-27'].forEach\(d=>{try{const r=require\('./cfp-agent/results/history/'+d+'.json'\);const s=r.by_source.find\(x=>x.source_name==='Funds for NGOs'\);if\(s\)console.log\(d,'| chars:',s.listing_chars,'| links:',s.links_found,'| processed:',s.cfps_processed,'| eligible:',s.eligible_count\);}catch\(e\){}}\);")

Bash(node -e "for\(const d of ['2026-05-25','2026-05-18','2026-05-11','2026-05-04','2026-04-27','2026-04-22']\){try{const r=require\('./cfp-agent/results/history/'+d+'.json'\);const s=r.by_source.find\(x=>x.source_name==='EU Funding & Tenders Portal'\);if\(s\)console.log\(d,'| api_items:',s.api_items_returned,'| chars:',s.listing_chars,'| links:',s.links_found,'| processed:',s.cfps_processed,'| reused:',s.cfps_reused\);else console.log\(d,'no entry'\);}catch\(e\){console.log\(d,'err:',e.message\);}}")
